opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I went to the toilet and the bowl was completely dark red with large blood clots, but I have absolutely no pain.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: There's been a lot of visible blood and clots in my urine on and off since yesterday and it's frightening me — I live on my own and I'm scared.

symptom_narrative.duration: three separate episodes over the last day
symptom_narrative.character: the blood seems to be there through the whole wee, dark red, with several large clots
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the amount of blood is really frightening even though it doesn't hurt
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the urine; just a vague heaviness low in my belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes and goes, but when it comes the blood is right through the stream
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: for a few weeks before this I had burning and I was needing to go really often and urgently — I was told it might be a water infection but the antibiotics didn't help. I've also lost about 4 kg over the last couple of months without trying and I feel wiped out and tired all the time. No back or side pain, no fevers.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never seen blood in my urine before this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm very anxious, I've been resting in bed and keep checking the toilet bowl; I live alone and I'm frightened I might collapse

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recently treated for a suspected water/urine infection that didn't get better
past_medical_history.how_managed: a course of antibiotics that made no difference

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medications, and definitely nothing that thins the blood

social_history_volunteered.smoking_status: I've smoked heavily for years — about a pack a day for around 40 years
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; home is described as smelling strongly of tobacco with several full ashtrays

objective_data_offered.value: the toilet bowl is dark red with several large blood clots; it has happened three times in the last day
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's visual description over chat; colour and clot size not measured or confirmed

objective_data_offered.value: about 71 kg on the bathroom scales, down roughly 4 kg over two months
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported home scale reading; the weight loss is patient-estimated, not documented

objective_data_offered.value: I look really pale and I feel shaky and anxious
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-described; pallor and haemodynamic state cannot be objectively assessed over chat
